title: ConstraintSchedulerNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-constraint-scheduler (job-shop / nurse-rostering / timetabling constraint scheduling over HTTP and NATS). The server subscribes to schedule requests under the dd-constraint-scheduler queue group, publishes computed schedules plus runtime events. Payloads carry a scheduler.schedule.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

subjects.name: SchedulerScheduleRequests
subjects.description: Inbound constraint-scheduling requests (job-shop, rostering, timetabling) consumed by the scheduler. Subscribed with the dd-constraint-scheduler queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for SCHEDULER_SCHEDULE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.scheduler.schedule.requests

subjects.name: SchedulerScheduleResults
subjects.description: Computed schedules (task start times, makespan, machine assignments, violations) emitted by the scheduler. Carries a scheduler.schedule.v1 envelope. Default for SCHEDULER_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.scheduler.schedule.results

queueGroups.name: ConstraintSchedulerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-constraint-scheduler replicas consuming schedule requests.
